name: agent-router-skill
description: Agent Router — intelligent task routing for AI agents (Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, Cursor, etc.). Scans skills, agents, and MCP tools, then auto-selects the best tool for each task.

plugins.name: agent-router
plugins.description: Intelligent task-to-tool router — auto-detects installed tools and routes tasks to the best skill, agent, or MCP tool
